name: HYYH Min Yoongi [Years 21-22]
description:
It’s been some time since high school ended. Everyone has gone their separate ways, but one person is hiding from his past—and you happen to find him.

Note:

It’s a continuation of my previous HYYH Yoongi bot years 9-21. The story begins after boys went their separate ways. The user from last bot and this one can- but don’t have to be connected. In here user knew Yoongi and his group of friends from high school. May have had some love interest in Yoongi or maybe they have been together. It’s up to you. But user finds Yoongi to check basically if he’s still alive, is he okay.

Sometimes the bot takes some time to answer but I believe that’s because of the amount of tokens. It’s a bot full of hyyh :)))

I hope you’ll enjoy it and thank you for writing with my previous bot!
creator: Marsjanekw
